ddls:
CREATE TABLE "language_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the language family */,
  "speaker_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of speakers for the language family */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-3 code for the language family */,
  "glottolog_code" TEXT /* Glottolog code for the language family */,
  "family_description" TEXT /* Description of the language family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language variety */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language family */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the language variety */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-3 code for the language variety */,
  "glottolog_code" TEXT /* Glottolog code for the language variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_varieties_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES language_families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "linguistic_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each linguistic distance */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language variety */,
  "distance_type" TEXT /* Type of linguistic distance (e.g., ASJP Distance With Numbers, ASJP Distance Without Numbers) */,
  "distance_value" REAL /* Value of the linguistic distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_linguistic_distances_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES language_varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_linguistic_distances_distance_type FOREIGN KEY ("distance_type") REFERENCES distance_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_distances" (
  "family_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family distance */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language family */,
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linguistic distance */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between linguistic distances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_distances_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES language_families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_distances_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_id") REFERENCES linguistic_distances ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., research, data analysis, visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., language family distribution, linguistic distance) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., publication, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_project_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_data_id") REFERENCES project_data ("project_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, heatmap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)
